refnamediv.refpurpose: Estimate a local adaptive threshold surface.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: threshold = imadaptthresh(image) threshold = imadaptthresh(image, window, sensitivity)

listitem.para: Input grayscale or RGB image. RGB input is converted to grayscale.
Scalar or two-element odd positive local window size. Default is [15 15].
Threshold sensitivity in [0, 1]. Larger values lower the local threshold. Default is 0.5.
Double local threshold image clipped to [0, 1].

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Estimates a normalized threshold at each pixel from the local mean and standard deviation. Higher sensitivity lowers the local threshold and generally produces more foreground pixels.

refsection.title: Examples
